title: capnophyllum peregrinum
intro: Capnophyllum peregrinum, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Capnophyllum peregrinum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote kidney function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional remedies and supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
